metadata.title: いざ歌えいざ祝え
metadata.subtitle: O du fröhliche — Japanese (讃美歌, 1931), tr. Nakayama Masaki
metadata.lyricist: Johannes Falk (1768–1826) + Heinrich Holzschuher (1798–1847) — Japanese translation by Nakayama Masaki 中山昌樹 (1886–1944)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original German lyrics by Falk (d. 1826) and Holzschuher (d. 1847) are PD by > 150 years; melody is anonymous Sicilian tradition. Japanese translation by Nakayama Masaki (d. 1944) — > 70 years post-mortem, PD per Japanese copyright law. First published in 讃美歌 (1931) no. 94. Japanese Wikisource explicitly marks the translation as PD-old-50-1996
